wins.event: Q2 revenue $7.7B record, +32% YoY; record FCF $1.2B; ex-write-down GM 54%
MI350 production began ahead of schedule in June; 7 of top 10 AI model builders use Instinct
Multibillion-dollar HUMAIN collaboration; 40+ active sovereign AI engagements
Q3 guidance $8.7B (+28% YoY); 33rd consecutive quarter of server CPU share gains

risks.event: $800M inventory and related charges from MI308 China export controls (-$0.43 EPS)
Data Center segment swung to operating loss of $155M from $743M income YoY
MI308 China license review still pending; no revenue in Q3 outlook
Embedded revenue $824M, -4% YoY; recovery still gradual

guidance.notes: Q3 guide $8.7B implies +28% YoY and +13% sequential — strong acceleration. GM expected to recover to 54%. Multi-year aspiration of tens of billions in AI revenue restated.

_notes: Strong execution overshadowed by $800M China write-down. License review moving forward is a positive signal. Q3 guidance acceleration impressive. Story remains clearly bullish.
